place_name: Surrey Hills Grocer - One Holland Village (Pet Friendly)
notes: Official One Holland Village menu page is image-based and confirms item names/descriptions. Prices are left null where not visible in the official image menu; three priced OHV items were cross-checked against Little Day Out at https://www.littledayout.com/surrey-hills-grocer-one-holland-village/.

items.name: Mexican Corn Soup
items.description: Charred corn soup with feta and grilled pita.

items.name: Miso Clam Chowder
items.description: Clam chowder with vegetables, aged shoyu, sake and toasted focaccia.

items.name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad
items.description: Baby gem lettuce with anchovy garlic dressing, bacon, egg and grilled chicken.

items.name: Triple Truffle Fries
items.description: Fries with truffle powder, truffle oil, parmesan and truffle mayo.

items.name: Classic Stack
items.description: Three pancakes with vanilla creme chantilly, whipped butter and maple syrup.

items.name: Fried Chicken Stack
items.description: Pancakes with buttermilk fried chicken, chilli honey, parmesan and whipped butter.

items.name: Truffled Wagyu Donut
items.description: Wagyu patty with pepper relish, truffle cheese, burger sauce and fries.

items.name: Chicken Katsu Tikka Marsala
items.description: Breaded chicken with tikka masala sauce, parmesan and salad.

items.name: Barramundi Salsa Verde
items.description: Locally farmed barramundi with salsa verde and fennel salad.

place_name: Common Man Coffee Roasters - Stanley Street
notes: Official Common Man day menu PDF lists 11 Stanley St among covered outlets. Prices are exclusive of service charge and taxes.

items.name: Crunchy Granola
items.description: Spiced nuts and seeds, coconut flakes, goji berries, Greek yoghurt and fruit compote.

items.name: Umami Mushroom Avocado Toast
items.description: Mushrooms, avocado smash, red onion pickle, focaccia and togarashi.

items.name: Common Man Full Breakfast
items.description: Eggs, bacon, pork sausage, tomato, hash browns, mushroom, baked beans and toast.

items.name: Warm Kale Salad
items.description: Kale with egg white scramble, broccolini, sourdough crumbs and parmesan.

items.name: Rainbow Rice Bowl
items.description: Brown rice, poached egg, spicy pineapple kimchi, sweet potato chips and buckwheat.

items.name: Prawn Linguine Aglio Olio
items.description: Linguine with prawns, roasted garlic, chilli and olive oil.

items.name: Fish and Chips
items.description: Beer-battered halibut with fries, salad and yuzu kosho tartare.

items.name: Butter Chicken Rice
items.description: Chicken thigh with mint yoghurt, cashew, pappadum, mango chutney and brown rice.

items.name: Black
items.description: Espresso coffee served black.

items.name: Kaya Toast Latte
items.description: Espresso with oat milk, coconut, pandan and kaya foam.

items.name: B&C Signature Sourdough Bread Board
items.description: Signature sourdough bread board.

items.name: Mushroom Pate on Toast

items.name: Avo Smash
items.description: Avocado smash brunch toast.

items.name: Fully Loaded Chicken Sandwich
items.description: Loaded chicken sandwich.

items.name: Tomato & Cheese Croissant

items.name: Butter Croissant

items.name: Latte

items.name: Carrot & Apple Juice
items.description: Fresh carrot and apple juice.

notes: Official Hillview outlet page at https://coexistcoffee.co/pages/hillview confirms the location and dining policies but does not publish the itemized menu. Foodpanda Hillview listing was used for item names, descriptions and pre-discount menu prices.

items.name: Coexist Breakfast
items.description: Sourdough with mushrooms, potatoes, tomato, maple bacon and pork garlic sausage.

items.name: Chicken Waffle
items.description: Belgian waffle with buttermilk fried chicken and maple syrup.

items.name: Guac Toast
items.description: Brioche with guacamole, basil cherry tomatoes and feta.

items.name: Surf & Turf CCF
items.description: Chee cheong fun with tiger prawn, chicken char siew, laksa sauce and egg.

items.name: Half Roasted Chicken
items.description: Half roasted chicken with charred broccoli and chicken jus.

items.name: Laksa Fish And Chips
items.description: Tempura halibut with laksa cream sauce, pickles, salad and fries.

items.name: Aglio Olio
items.description: Linguine with garlic, chilli padi, chilli flakes, parsley, kombu dashi and grana padano.

items.name: Black Pepper Crab Pasta
items.description: Linguine with soft-shell crab, red swimming crab, black pepper and chilli padi.

items.name: Chili Crab Shakshuka
